FACEBOOK PAGE GROWTH STRATEGY
Mindset and techniques to help achieve 10X growth!
• Start Weekly Live Stream
• Create a Messenger Chatbot
• Tag Major Influencers in Posts
• Start Boosting Best Posts
• Create a Facebook Group
• Tag Minor Influencers in Posts
• Start Posting Regular Content
• Collect Feedback and Ideas
• Tag Engaged Followers in Posts
• Profile Setup and Design
• Invite Friends and Family
• Follow All Relevant Pages
